recommendations.title: A History of Violence
recommendations.overview: An average family is thrust into the spotlight after the father commits a seemingly self-defense murder at his diner.

recommendations.title: Eastern Promises
recommendations.overview: A Russian teenager living in London dies during childbirth but leaves clues in her diary that could tie her child to a rape involving a violent Russian mob family.

recommendations.title: The Fly
recommendations.overview: When Seth Brundle makes a huge scientific and technological breakthrough in teleportation, he decides to test it on himself. Unbeknownst to him, a common housefly manages to get inside the device and the two become one.

recommendations.title: Shivers
recommendations.overview: The residents of a suburban high-rise apartment building are infected by parasites that turn them into mindless nymphomaniac fiends.

recommendations.title: M. Butterfly
recommendations.overview: In 1960s China, French diplomat Rene Gallimard falls in love with an opera singer, Song Liling – but Song is not at all who Gallimard thinks.

recommendations.title: Crash
recommendations.overview: A car crash victim suddenly finds himself turned on by car accidents and becomes involved with an underground sub-culture of like-minded souls.

recommendations.title: Cosmopolis
recommendations.overview: Riding across Manhattan in a stretch limo during a riot in order to get a haircut, a 28-year-old billionaire asset manager's life begins to crumble.

recommendations.title: Rabid
recommendations.overview: After undergoing radical surgery for injuries from a motorcycle accident, a young woman develops a retractable, vampiric stinger in her armpit and a thirst for human blood.

recommendations.title: Scanners
recommendations.overview: After a man with extraordinary, and frighteningly destructive, telepathic abilities is nabbed by agents from a mysterious rogue corporation, he discovers he is far from the only possessor of such strange powers. Some of the other “scanners” have thei

recommendations.title: The Shrouds
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Thriller, Horror, Drama, Mystery
